briefdescription.para: Restores the base state of the DA_Ephys panel. Useful when adding controls to GUI. Facilitates use of auto generation of GUI code. Useful when template experiment file has been overwritten.

inbodydescription.para: needs to be in sync with GetTPSettings()

briefdescription.para: Synced with desc in DAP_CheckSettingsAcrossYoked()
Creates meta information about coupled CheckBoxes (Radio Button) controls Used for saving/restoring the GUI state.

simplesect.para: Free text wave with lists of coupled CheckBox controls

briefdescription.para: Returns a list of DAC devices for NI devices.
Returns a list of ITC devices for DAC.
Returns a list of available ITC and NI devices.
Return a popValue string suitable for stimsets.

xrefdescription.para: rework the code to have a fixed popValue

briefdescription.para: Check by querying the GUI if the device is a leader.

detaileddescription.para: Outside callers should use DeviceHasFollower() instead.

briefdescription.para: Updates the yoking controls on all locked/unlocked panels.
Called by ACL tab control after the tab is updated. see line 257 of ACL_TabUtilities.ipf.
Determines if the control refers to an "All" control.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable controlChannelIndex, variable channelNumber, variable channelType)
memberdef.name: DAP_DACHasExpectedClampMode

briefdescription.para: Helper for "All" controls in the DA tab.

simplesect.para: 0 if the given channel is a DA channel and not in the expected clamp mode as determined by controlChannelIndex, 1 otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channelType, variable channelNumber, variable clampMode)
memberdef.name: GetHeadstageFromSettings

briefdescription.para: Get the headstage for the given channel number and type from the amplifier settings.

detaileddescription.para: This is different from what GetChannelClampMode holds as we here hold the setup information and GetChannelClampMode holds what is currently active.

briefdescription.para: Adapt the state of the associated headstage on DA/AD channel change.
Return the repeated acquisition cycle ID for the given devide.

detaileddescription.para: Follower and leader will have the same repeated acquisition cycle ID.

briefdescription.para: One time initialization before data acquisition.
Enable all controls which were disabled before DAQ by DAP_OneTimeCallBeforeDAQ.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable stopReason, variable forcedStop=defaultValue, variable startTPAfterDAQ=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DAP_OneTimeCallAfterDAQ

briefdescription.para: One time cleaning up after data acquisition.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to false] if DAQ was aborted (true) or stopped by itself (false)
[optional, defaults to true] start "TP after DAQ" if enabled at the end

briefdescription.para: Update the ITI for the given device, takes care of handling yoked devices.
Procedure for DA/TTL popupmenus including indexing wave popupmenus.
Return the sampling interval with taking the mode, the multiplier and the fixed frequency selection into account.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] returns if the choosen sampling interval is valid or not (DAQ only)

xrefdescription.para: display correct values for yoked devices

briefdescription.para: Return a nicely layouted list of amplifier channels.
Parse the entries which DAP_GetAmplifierDef() created.
Check the settings across yoked devices.
Check if all settings are valid to send a test pulse or acquire data.

detaileddescription.para: For invalid settings an informative message is printed into the history area.
Callers must ensure to set the acquisition state back to AS_INACTIVE when calling with DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE.

simplesect.para: 0 for valid settings, 1 for invalid settings

briefdescription.para: Returns zero if everything is okay, 1 if a non-recoverable error was found and 2 on recoverable errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable channelType, variable channel, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: DAP_CheckStimset

briefdescription.para: Synchronizes the contents of ChanAmpAssign and ChanAmpAssignUnit to all active headstages.
Reads the channel amp waves and inserts that info into the DA_EPHYS panel.
Returns the name of the checkbox control (radio button) handling the clamp mode of the given headstage or all headstages.

parameterdescription.para: One of the amplifier modes AmplifierClampModes
number of the headstage or one of AllHeadstageModeConstants

briefdescription.para: Return information readout from headstage and clamp mode controls.

detaileddescription.para: Users interested in the clamp mode of a known headstage should prefer DAG_GetHeadstageMode() instead.

parameterdescription.para: control can be either Radio_ClampMode_* or Check_DataAcqHS_* referring to an existing control
I_CLAMP_MODE, V_CLAMP_MODE or I_EQUAL_ZERO_MODE, the currently active mode for headstage controls and the clamp mode of the control for clamp mode controls
number of the headstage or one of AllHeadstageModeConstants

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable clampMode, variable headstage, variable options)
memberdef.name: DAP_ChangeHeadStageMode

briefdescription.para: Change the clamp mode of the given headstage.

parameterdescription.para: Headstage [0, 8[ or use one of AllHeadstageModeConstants

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable oldClampMode, variable newClampMode)
memberdef.name: DAP_PublishClampModeChange

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable clampMode, variable delayed=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DAP_SetAmpModeControls

briefdescription.para: Sets the control state of the radio buttons used for setting the clamp mode on the Data Acquisition Tab of the DA_Ephys panel.

parameterdescription.para: controls associated with headstage are set
indicate on the control that the change is delayed

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, variable clampMode, variable delayed=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DAP_SetHeadstageChanControls

briefdescription.para: Sets the DA and AD channel settings according to the headstage mode.

parameterdescription.para: Channels associated with headstage are set
[optional, defaults to false] Indicate that this is a delayed clamp mode change

briefdescription.para: Set the acquisition button text.
Set the testpulse button text.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the list of potential followers for yoking.
Used by popup_Hardware_AvailITC1600s from the hardware tab

briefdescription.para: The Lead button in the yoking controls sets the attached ITC1600 as the device that will trigger all the other devices yoked to it.
Sets the lists and buttons on the follower device actively being yoked.
Check box procedure for multiple device (MD) support.
Enable controls post DAQ/TP in single device mode.
Controls TP Insertion into set sweeps before the sweep begins.
Update the onset delay due to the Insert TP setting.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string ctrl, string list, variable checked)
memberdef.name: DAP_ToggleCheckBoxes

briefdescription.para: Allows two checkboxes to be treated as a group where only one can be checked at a time.

detaileddescription.para: Write into the GUI state wave as well

briefdescription.para: Return the comment panel name.
Return the full window path to the comment notebook.
Create the comment panel.
Add the current user comment of the previous sweep to the comment notebook and to the labnotebook.

detaileddescription.para: The SetVariable for the user comment is also cleared

briefdescription.para: Make the comment notebook read-only.
Make the comment notebook writeable.
Clear the comment notebook's content and the serialized string.
Serialize all comment notebooks.
Copy the contents of the comment notebook to the user comment string.
Create a new DA_Ephys panel.
Sets the locked indexing logic checkbox states.
Extracts channelType, controlType and channelIndex from ctrl

simplesect.para: 0 if the control name could be parsed, one otherwise

briefdescription.para: Update the list of available pressure devices on all locked device panels.
Query the device lock status.

simplesect.para: device lock status, 1 if unlocked, 0 if locked

briefdescription.para: GUI procedure which has the only purpose of storing the control state in the GUI state wave.
Update the list of locked devices.
This function sets a ITC1600 device as a follower, ie. The internal clock is used to synchronize 2 or more PCI-1600.
Helper function to update all DAQ related controls after something changed.
Applies user settings for the clamp mode stimulus sets (DA Set and Indexing End Set) on mode switch.

parameterdescription.para: MIES headstage number, must be in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES]
[optional, defaults to false] On a delayed clamp mode change the stimulus set is not set.

briefdescription.para: Return the list of available sampling multipliers.

detaileddescription.para: Has no NONE element as 1 means no multiplier.

briefdescription.para: Return the list of available fixed sampling frequencies.
Return the list of available Oscilloscope Update Modes.
Update the device info waves for all passed devices.

detaileddescription.para: Usually only called once during startup

parameterdescription.para: list of devices usable for DAQ and pressure

briefdescription.para: Update the popup menus and its USER_DATA_MENU_EXP user data after stim set changes.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to all locked devices] device

briefdescription.para: Delete the stimulus set in the given DAEphys.

detaileddescription.para: Internal use only, outside callers should use ST_RemoveStimSet()

briefdescription.para: Write all TP settings from the data acquisition/settings tab to the settings wave.
Convert the control name to a dimension label for GetTPSettings()
Write a new TP setting value to the wave.
Synchronize the TP settings from the wave into the GUI.

detaileddescription.para: Needs to be done when the selected headstage changes or the TPsettings wave contents. This function ignores "Send To All HS" as this does not make sense to respect here.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to all] Only update one of the entries TPSettings. Accepted strings are the labels from DAP_TPControlToLabel().

briefdescription.para: DAP Main data acquisition panel routines
